Package kbtu.model.user

package kbtu.model.user
  • Class
    Description
    Admin
    System administrator — manages users and views audit logs.
    Employee
    Abstract class representing all university employees.
    GraduateStudent
    A graduate student (Master or PhD). 4th-year+ students can be assigned a research supervisor who must have h-index >= 3.
    Manager
    Academic/administrative manager.
    Message
    Represents a message exchanged between employees.
    Researcher
     
    ResearchStaff
    Employee who is not a teacher or student but still conducts research.
    SeniorStudent
    4th-year bachelor who can conduct research and has a supervisor.
    Student
    Represents a bachelor student in the university system.
    Teacher
    Represents a teacher/instructor in the university.
    TeacherRating
    Represents a student's rating of a teacher for a course.
    User
